description_long: This is a classic Adidas football, predominantly white with black and gray ornate triangular panel designs. The ball features the Adidas logo and the text 'ETRUSCO UNICO' on opposite panels, both rendered in black. The surface is composed of multiple stitched panels, forming a traditional spherical shape with a slightly glossy finish. The panel seams are visible, suggesting a hand-stitched or machine-stitched construction. The ball appears to be in pristine condition, with no visible scuffs, dirt, or deformation. Its size and design are consistent with a standard match football, suitable for use in parks, streets, or sports fields.
description: A white Adidas football with black and gray ornate panel designs, featuring the Adidas logo and 'ETRUSCO UNICO' text. The ball is clean, glossy, and traditionally paneled.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Adidas logo on one ball and 'ETRUSCO UNICO' text on the other, with ornate black and gray triangular panels.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the curvature and panel seams, with less visible branding but clear panel pattern.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, both logos are visible, emphasizing the branding and decorative panel design.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the panel seams and ornate patterns, with branding less visible.
